rationale: The citing paper references Palmatier, Scheer, and Steenkamp (2007) only once, in a grouped introductory citation supporting the general claim that firms fear customer loyalty may shift from the firm to individual staff. The article does not subsequently engage this specific study's constructs, findings, measures, or methods when developing hypotheses or interpreting results. Its model development and tests rely on a broader service-relationship literature rather than direct extension or refinement of Palmatier et al.
